scene_summary: A museum-like toy craft hall with a glossy cream enamel floor covered in striped gourds and small tiger toys, backed by a large painted cloud-city mural. Around the scene are visible display surfaces including a poster cabinet, paper swatch rack, brass PRD tablet, alphabet ribbon loom, lacquer automaton cabinet, cracked green egg vessel full of notes, and a wire-and-node drafting frame.
usable_surfaces: glossy cream floor with repeated toy objects
left East Asian toy poster cabinet
cracked green egg vessel with paper notes

detected_objects.label: cream enamel gourd-parade floor
detected_objects.visual_evidence: The lower half of the image is a glossy cream floor with teal circles, reflections, striped gourds, and small green tiger toys spread across it.

detected_objects.label: charcoal cloud-city backdrop wall
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A large central painted wall panel shows towers, clouds, balloons, and a blue sky, clearly forming the main background image surface.

detected_objects.label: East Asian graphics poster cabinet
detected_objects.visual_evidence: At far left is a tilted display board with visible East Asian text, toy illustrations, and printed poster panels.

detected_objects.label: aurora paper swatch rack
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A freestanding rack holds stacked horizontal sheets in pastel rainbow colors, each appearing like sample paper or printed swatches.

detected_objects.label: black pine game-box automaton
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A black lacquer cabinet with gold decoration and an illuminated pine scene sits in front of the backdrop.

detected_objects.label: brass PRD recipe tablet
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A rectangular brass tablet on a small wooden stand is engraved with the large letters 'PRD' and a recipe-like ingredient list.

detected_objects.label: variable alphabet ribbon loom
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A mechanical roller frame displays long paper ribbons printed with alphabet rows and punctuation.

detected_objects.label: green egg reliquary
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A cracked green ceramic egg-shaped vessel is open on the floor and contains multiple folded paper notes with visible writing.

detected_objects.label: wire-and-node drafting frame
detected_objects.visual_evidence: On the right is a large circular bent-wire structure with colored nodes, connecting rods, and hanging paper tags.

detected_objects.label: cream enamel gourd-parade floor
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source artifact from the scene brief.
